SPHL612 Research Ethics (1 Credit)

Overview and discussion of ethical issues that face public health researchers.

Restriction: Must be a graduate student in the School of Public Health. Credit Only Granted for. EPIB641, KNES689Y or SPHL612.

Formerly: EPIB641, KNES689Y.
